name: 异常检测告警
description: 监控数据流，检测异常值并告警

config.sql: SELECT value FROM metrics WHERE time > datetime('now', '-5 minutes') ORDER BY time DESC

config.script: const values = query.rows.map(r => r.value); const avg = values.reduce((a,b) => a+b, 0) / values.length; const std = Math.sqrt(values.reduce((a,b) => a + (b-avg)**2, 0) / values.length); const anomalies = values.filter(v => Math.abs(v - avg) > 2 * std); return {avg, std, anomalies: anomalies.length, total: values.length}

config.title: 异常检测
config.text: 检测到 {{analyze.anomalies}} 个异常值 (均值: {{analyze.avg}}, 标准差: {{analyze.std}})
